summary: PostgreSQL for time-series and analytics. Build faster with Timescale Cloud.
eligibility: Early-stage startups building time-series or analytics applications.
body: Timescale is PostgreSQL for time-series, events, and analytics. Get the power of a relational database with the speed of a time-series database. Perfect for IoT, analytics, and event tracking workloads.

title: Together AI startup program
summary: GPU inference credits for AI startups. Fast, affordable inference on open-source models with unified API.
eligibility: AI startups building generative AI applications.
body: Together AI provides instant access to state-of-the-art open-source models. Startups get fast inference with a unified API that makes it easy to switch between models and deploy at scale.

title: Twilio Segment startup credits
summary: Twilio Segment startup initiatives may provide credits for customer data and messaging infrastructure.
eligibility: Startups accepted through approved startup programs or partner channels.
body: Specific credit amounts and services included may vary by track. Confirm details on current Twilio/Segment startup offers.

title: Typeform for Startups form plan discounts
summary: Typeform startup offers may include free periods or discounted plans for form and survey workflows.
eligibility: Early-stage startups through startup partner programs or direct startup qualification.
body: Offer terms and plan limits vary over time. Check current startup benefits before committing.

title: Vanta for Startups
summary: Automated security compliance for startups. The fastest path to SOC 2, ISO 27001, and other certifications.
eligibility: Early-stage startups pursuing security compliance certifications.
body: Vanta automates evidence collection for security compliance. Startups can achieve SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and more with automated monitoring and streamlined audits.

title: Vast.ai startup program
summary: $2,500 in free GPU credits for AI startups. Distributed AI infrastructure with competitive pricing.
eligibility: AI startups looking to move GPU workloads to Vast.ai infrastructure.
body: Vast.ai offers $2,500 in free GPU credits for startups that move their AI workloads to Vast.ai. Get access to distributed GPU infrastructure with flexible pricing options.

title: Vercel for Startups platform credits
summary: Vercel for Startups provides startup-focused platform credits and support through partner ecosystems.
eligibility: Early-stage startups, typically through approved startup partners, incubators, or VC programs.
body: Benefit amounts and eligibility can vary by partner and cohort. Confirm current terms before applying.

title: Warp for Startups
summary: AI-powered terminal for startups. Build faster with the terminal built for the AI era.
eligibility: Early-stage startups needing modern terminal experience.
body: Warp is the AI-powered terminal that helps developers build faster. Features include AI command generation, reusable workflows, and seamless team collaboration.

title: Weaviate for Startups vector search credits
summary: Weaviate startup programs can include cloud credits and onboarding support for vector search applications.
eligibility: Early-stage startups building AI/search products and meeting startup program criteria.
body: Credits and usage limits can vary by program and region. Verify current startup terms on official Weaviate channels.

title: Webflow for Startups workspace discounts
summary: Webflow startup support can include free or discounted workspace and publishing plans for early teams.
eligibility: Eligible startups through partner ecosystems or direct startup programs.
body: Offer structure may vary by startup partner and region. Confirm current program details before applying.

title: Whimsical for Startups
summary: Free 12 months of Whimsical for startups. Everything your startup needs to think, plan, and build—faster.
eligibility: Startups backed by Whimsical partners. Revenue under $1M gets 12 months free, under 50 employees, new customer.
body: Whimsical is the hub for visual collaboration, where great ideas take shape. Combine whiteboarding, diagramming, and wireframing with documentation to go from brainstorming and prototypes to live products. Startups backed by partners get up to 12 months of Pro for free.

title: Wiz for Startups
summary: Cloud security platform for startups. Find and fix cloud security risks in minutes.
eligibility: Early-stage startups building on cloud infrastructure needing security.
body: Wiz provides cloud security for startups, helping find and fix security risks across your cloud environment. Get enterprise-grade cloud security posture management (CSPM) without the enterprise complexity.

title: WorkOS for Startups
summary: Enterprise-grade identity and auth for startups. Modern SSO, SAML, and directory sync at startup-friendly pricing.
eligibility: Early-stage startups needing enterprise auth features.
body: WorkOS provides startups with enterprise-ready identity features including SSO, SAML, Directory Sync, and more. Build enterprise features without the enterprise complexity.

title: Zoom for Startups communication discounts
summary: Zoom startup-focused offerings can include discounted or free licenses through approved startup channels.
eligibility: Eligible startups, frequently through startup partner ecosystems.
body: License counts and discount duration vary. Verify current startup terms with Zoom before relying on this offer.
